articles.title: 'That may change in two or three years' - Rahul Dravid believes bowlers will start dominating T20 cricket soon
articles.description: “In a sense, to see the quality of batting that has happened over the last two or three years, I think the bowlers in that format of the game will slowly have to do some catching up," Dravid said.

articles.title: Ben Duckett returns to form in County Championship after snubbing IPL deal
articles.description: Coming in to bat at number three, Duckett went on to score 203 not out from 311 balls in the second innings following a knock of 42 in the first innings.
